mapper.sql: wrk_dly_rpt_idx AS idx, wrk_dly_rpt_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx AS mbrAcctIdx, rpt_dt AS rptDt, cntn, sts, spcl_note AS spclNote, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt

wrk_wkl_rpt_idx AS idx, wrk_wkl_rpt_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx AS mbrAcctIdx, wk_strt_dt AS wkStrtDt, wk_end_dt AS wkEndDt, ttl, cntn, opn_yn AS opnYn, pbls_at AS pblsAt, gen_type AS genType, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_wrk_dly_rpt WHERE wrk_dly_rpt_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM tb_wrk_dly_rpt WHERE wrk_dly_rpt_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wrk_dly_rpt ( mbr_acct_idx, rpt_dt, cntn, sts, spcl_note, created_by ) VALUES ( #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{rptDt}, #{cntn}, #{sts}, #{spclNote}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wrk_dly_rpt SET cntn = #{cntn}, sts = #{sts}, spcl_note = #{spclNote}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_dly_rpt_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT ma.mbr_acct_idx AS mbrAcctIdx, ma.mbr_acct_uuid AS mbrAcctUuid, ma.lgn_id, mp.nick_nm FROM tb_mbr_acct ma LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = ma.mbr_acct_idx WHERE ma.del_at IS NULL AND ma.acct_stat = 'ACTIVE'
AND ma.mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{mbrAcctUuid} AS UUID)
ORDER BY ma.lgn_id ASC

SELECT
FROM tb_wrk_wkl_rpt WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL ORDER BY wk_strt_dt DESC, updated_at DESC

SELECT
FROM tb_wrk_wkl_rpt WHERE wrk_wkl_rpt_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM tb_wrk_wkl_rpt WHERE wrk_wkl_rpt_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wrk_wkl_rpt ( mbr_acct_idx, wk_strt_dt, wk_end_dt, ttl, cntn, opn_yn, pbls_at, gen_type, created_by ) VALUES ( #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{wkStrtDt}, #{wkEndDt}, #{ttl}, #{cntn}, #{opnYn}, #{pblsAt}, #{genType}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wrk_wkl_rpt SET wk_strt_dt = #{wkStrtDt}, wk_end_dt = #{wkEndDt}, ttl = #{ttl}, cntn = #{cntn}, opn_yn = #{opnYn}, pbls_at = #{pblsAt}, gen_type = #{genType}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_wkl_rpt_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
